item.title: Midjourney has a new side quest... death
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Try out Retool's new AI app builder to safely connect your apps to your team's data and APIs - https://fandf.co/4e2lDe2
Founder of Midjourney, David Holz, just announced plans to make a new medical imaging device capable of full body scans which he claims is faster and cheaper than an MRI. But how does it work, if at all?
#coding #programming #ai
🔖 Topics Covered - Midjourney Medical - Fullbody Ultrasonic Computational Tomography (FUCT) - Midjourney Spa - Will it work?
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: The most trusted code on Earth is being rewritten in Rust
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Junie is the #1 coding agent on SWE-Rebench and it'll save you a bunch of tokens - https://jb.gg/Fireship-Junie-GA
Use code: FIRESHIP20 to to get 20 free AI credits
SQLite, the world's most trusted code, just got rewritten in Rust and it actually works. It's called Turso and it ships some cool features you won't find in SQLite.
#coding #programming #technology
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: I read every major CS paper of the last 100 years...
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Coder lets you self-host your coding agents with enterprise-grade security - https://fandf.co/4tZvtU5
These 10 mind-blowing computer science papers made everything in modern computing possible. In today's video, we'll take a look at how they changed the world for better or worse.
#coding #programming #computerscience #computer
🔖 Topics Covered
- On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem, Alan Turing 1936 - A Mathematical Theory of Communication, Claude Shannon 1948 - The Perceptron, Rosenblatt 1958 - Perceptrons, Marvin Minsky and Seymour Papert 1969 - Time, Clocks, and the Ordering of Events in a Distributed System, Leslie Lamport 1978 - Learning representations by back-propagating errors, Rumelhart, Hinton, Williams 1986 - The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine, Sergey Brin and Larry Page 1998 - ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks, Krizhevsky, Sutskever, Hinton 2012 - Attention Is All You Need, Vaswani, Google 2017 - Language Models are Few-Shot Learners, Brown, OpenAI 2020
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: One man just liberated Fable... and now it’s illegal
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Take BlueDot's Future of AI course for free - https://bluedot.org/fireship
Just three days after the release of Claude Fable, the US government stepped in and banned it in the name of national security. But why?
#coding #programming #ai
🔖 Topics Covered - What makes Fable allegedly unsafe? - Fable Jailbreak - Fable gets banned
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: Anthropic begged the world to stop AI… then shipped this
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Render is the easiest place to ship full-stack apps and agents. The first 2,000 people to use the code RENDER-FIRESHIP will get $50 in credits: https://dashboard.render.com/register?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic_video&utm_campaign=2026_partnership_fireship
This week, Anthropic released Claude Fable, a Mythos class model that's been carefully lobotomized for public consumption. But is it legit? Let's run it...
#coding #programming #ai
🔖 Topics Covered - Claude Fable release - Fable 5 vs Opus 4.8 - Fable 5 Demo
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: New onboarding to Skore with a Jupyter(lite) notebook
item.author: probabl
item.content:encoded: Get onboard in less than 1 min ☝️ Push a report on the skore hub from our jupyterlite notebook example

item.title: Anthropic is starting to panic…
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Get $30 of Pioneer inference credits for only $5 - https://pioneer.ai/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=ext_social&utm_campaign=pioneer_launch&utm_content=FS
Anthropic just proposed something insane - the idea that maybe we should wait a second and pause all AI development. But why now?
#coding #programming #ai #nthropic
📚 Resources - https://www.anthropic.com/institute/recursive-self-improvement
Want more Fireship?
🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev 🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev

item.title: The forgotten developer who saved JavaScript...
item.author: Fireship
item.content:encoded:
Clerk's new CLI sets up end-to-end auth for your entire app. Try it - https://go.clerk.com/0mR9oMU
JavaScript was terrible... until one man was brave enough to save it.
#coding #programming #javascript
Want more Fireship?
